notes: v1.14.150 - TEMPORARY in-app GLOW TUNER dev tool (flag-gated, fully removable). Ported the React glow-tuner concept to a self-contained vanilla block (no React/build/CDN). The ENTIRE addition is one contiguous region in dct-ios.html wrapped in <!-- GLOWTUNE-DEV BEGIN --> ... <!-- GLOWTUNE-DEV END --> (just before </body>): a single gated <script> that, ONLY when location.search contains 'glowtune=1' (mirrors the redesign_isOn legacy parse; no key persisted), builds a fixed bottom-right panel + injects its <style> at runtime and drives the live icon glow. If the flag is absent it returns immediately and injects NOTHING -> normal users and ?legacy=1 see nothing, legacy byte-identical. ICON GLOW only (CARD GLOW skipped = Fork A; card glow would need a persistent .rf-card refactor). Mechanism = zero CSS refactor: the panel sets the full filter string on the root via documentElement.style.setProperty('--icon-glow', value) - the single source of truth at line 8737 that .rf-i-img/.icon-glow/.lbtn-img already read via var(--icon-glow); saturate is folded INTO the string (consumers stay filter:var(--icon-glow) only). 9 sliders (intensity/saturate/depthY/depthBlur/depthOp/innerBlur/innerOp/outerBlur/outerOp) default to the locked .147 values (+ saturate 1.40). Per-page {command,work,ref} in-memory profile map; the panel has page tabs AND wraps showMode (defensively, try/caught, original called first) so navigating the redesign re-applies that page's glow live. 'Copy CSS' exports per-page blocks: body.pg-<page>{ --icon-glow: <string>; }. Panel: position:fixed right/bottom 10px (+ iPhone safe-area), z-index 99999, collapsible (header toggles; collapsed = just the header bar, does not block the app), dark PHANTOM styling. Because the panel CSS lives in a JS string injected at runtime (not a static <style>), the <style> brace-balance gate is UNCHANGED (3497). Removing = delete the GLOWTUNE-DEV region + revert the 3 stamps. Three-stamp lockstep 149->150; NO precache edit (no new assets). Gates: node --check x3 inline scripts + the new gated <script> (4th) + sw.js, CSS <style> brace balance unchanged 3497/3497, version.json valid JSON, 0 lone-LF (CRLF-preserving Node splice). CRLF splice verified lone-LF=0. HARD-STOP - visible UI -> John device-verify (do not self-approve): normal URL = NO panel + app unchanged; ?glowtune=1 = panel drives real icon glow live across Command/Work/Ref + Copy CSS works; ?legacy=1 unchanged. ROLLBACK: delete the GLOWTUNE-DEV region + revert stamps to 149. PRIOR .149 = blue Reference set; .148 = site-node header anchor; .147 = depth-shadow restore + BOM (blue rebrand complete).
